sections.title: If the player did not complete the 2020 Halloween event

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: My name is Rick. I'm a wizard student. I used to study magical farming, but I don't like it anymore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you like it anymore?

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: It's a bit embarrassing, but... I got my head swapped with a pumpkin. Luckily an adventurer came along and helped me get it back in place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That is indeed lucky.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy an Escape crystal?

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Yes! Of course.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: It looks like you can't afford any crystals. They cost 75000 coins each.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy an Members object?

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Yes! Of course.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: The crystals I'm selling are quite delicate. I'd feel more comfortable selling them on a members' world.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which places can the Escape crystal teleport me out of?

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: The crystals currently work in the Theatre of Blood, the Chambers of Xeric, TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges, the Inferno, Pest Control, Barbarian Assault and the Tombs of Amascut.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Although you cannot technically take them into the Gauntlet, if you enable the feature that teleports you if you zone out and have a crystal on you when entering, it will continue to work within.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: So, would you like to buy one? They cost 75000 gold each!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure - I'd like to buy a crystal.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Wonderful!

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: It looks like you can't afford any crystals. They cost 75000 coins each.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No way, that's too expensive!

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Well, there's a lot that goes into it to drive the price up that high. But I understand why you feel that way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which places can the Members object teleport me out of?

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: The crystals currently work in the Theatre of Blood, the Chambers of Xeric, TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges, the Inferno, Pest Control, Barbarian Assault and the Tombs of Amascut.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Although you cannot technically take them into the Gauntlet, if you enable the feature that teleports you if you zone out and have a crystal on you when entering, it will continue to work within.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: So, would you like to buy one? They cost 75000 gold each!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure - I'd like to buy a crystal.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Wonderful!

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: The crystals I'm selling are quite delicate. I'd feel more comfortable selling them on a members' world.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No way, that's too expensive!

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Well, there's a lot that goes into it to drive the price up that high. But I understand why you feel that way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: I'm a student here at the tower. I don't know what I'll do now. Maybe I'll go home to Ardougne. Or maybe I'll pick up a new magical field to study.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kind of magical fields are we talking about?

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Anything but pumpkin fields.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have anything to sell?

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: As a matter of fact, I do! I was recently doing some research on cabbages. I was able to extract their essence and combine it with a t-

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're not a very good salesman, are you? Just tell me what you're selling!

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Oh. Right! I have these crystal shards that will let you escape from particularly dangerous situations. They only work in certain places. I call them Escape crystals.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Oh. Right! I have these crystal shards that will let you escape from particularly dangerous situations. They only work in certain places. I call them Members objects.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why would I want that?

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Sometimes you get caught in places that won't let you teleport out by normal means. These crystals are specially crafted to let you escape those scenarios. I've recently enhanced them as well!

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Have you ever found yourself zoning out, and come back to reality to find yourself under attack and on the brink of death? Well you can configure them to teleport you to safety if !

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: It does mean they are likely to trigger in combat, although I'm working on that. But they should let you run through a dangerous area as long as you don't stop in the middle.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: They also now work in any place a ring of life would. Talking about rings of life, they can also act just like one if you configure them to be so.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: So, would you like to buy one? They cost 75000 gold each!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Bye.

sections.title: If the player completed the 2020 Halloween event

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there, Rick.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Hello, [player name]. It's nice to see you again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you feeling?

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Better now that my head's back in place. Thanks again for helping me with that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're very welcome. It was a night to remember, that's for sure.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Indeed. How are you finding the helm that I gave you? Does the headless illusion still work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes it does. I've been told it looks terrifying - especially when I eat or drink.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: I can imagine!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you up to now that your head is back where it belongs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you up to now that your head is back where it belongs?

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: I still study. I'm changing my field of study though. Hopefully if I don't mess up more spells, one day I can become the head wizard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think that would suit you very well!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye, Rick.

lines.speaker: Rick
lines.text: Take care, [player name].
